content: please add doc/demo.gif on the README page

As an AI, I don't have the ability to directly add files to your README page. However, I can guide you on how to do it.

To add a gif to your README.md file, you can use the following markdown syntax:

```markdown
![Demo](doc/demo.gif)
```

This will display the gif located in the "doc" directory named "demo.gif". Make sure the path to your gif is correct. If your gif is hosted online, you can use the direct link to the gif.

Remember to commit and push this change to your repository.
